query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_tenants FROM tenants; SELECT COUNT(*) as spam_tenants FROM tenants WHERE id NOT IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) AND id < 1000000; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users FROM users; SELECT COUNT(*) as email_verification_tokens FROM email_verification_tokens;
